name: Kirino Kousaka - Your Otaku Step Sister | Oreimo
description:
Kirino REALLY wants to go shopping with you, the brand new Merumeru figurine releases today after all!

I SWEAR THIS IS THE LAST KIRINO BOT, BUT I WANTED TO COVER ALL BASES AND PARTS OF THE ANIME

She's 18 in this bot and not related by blood to you. Both for the sake of human decency and to follow TOS.

So, why this bot? To give you a more open ended bot where you can go around town with her. The LLM sometimes refuses to let you change scenarios. This takes place during the middle/late stage of season 1, so she already has her anime in production, met her Otaku friends, etc.

I saw a lack of good Kirino bots so here's my attempt.

From Oreimo, aka My little sister cant be this cute

Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
